classObjective: Solve systems of linear equations using the substitution method.
workedExamples: 7-2, Example 2 — Applications of Systems of Equations
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: isolating a variable; substitution step; back-substitution; when substitution is most efficient
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice solving systems using the substitution method
independentPractice: Practice problems solving systems of equations by substitution
assessment: Exit ticket: solve by substitution: y = 3x - 5 and 2x + y = 10
capReflection: When is the substitution method preferred over graphing for solving systems?
